_meta.description: JSON patch for Batch 2 grammar fix completion — 2026-03-30
_meta.instructions: Apply these changes to modernization-ledger.json and initialization.json

M300.description: Grammar audit verified 2026-03-30: of 138 COBOL-85 gaps identified, ~102 are fixed. 36 verified remaining → 29 after Batch 1 → 26 after Batch 2. Batch 1 complete (7 items). Batch 2 complete (3 items: M400 pre-resolved, M402 grammar done, M408 done). Batch 3 next: CURRENCY WITH PICTURE SYMBOL (M407), SCREEN SECTION (M411).

sub_gaps_discovered: M427 — SORT Format 2 runtime (table sort binder/lowerer/emitter)

M400.evidence: Grammar setSwitchStatement was already implemented in prior session. NC174A passes 100% clean (77 PASS, 0 FAIL). Integration test: Set_SwitchOnOff_StillWorks. No grammar changes needed.

M402.evidence: Grammar: sortStatement input/output block made optional for Format 2 (table sort). sortKeyPhrase dataReferenceList made optional. Binder: BindSortKeys null-check added. Integration tests: Sort_Format2_TableSort, Sort_Format2_DescendingKey, Sort_Format2_WithDuplicates, Sort_Format1_FileSort_StillWorks. Sub-gap: runtime table sort not implemented (M427).

M408.evidence: Grammar: symbolicCharacterEntry changed from IDENTIFIER (IS|ARE) literal to cobolWord+ (IS|ARE) integerLiteral+ for N:N positional mapping. FOR ALPHANUMERIC/NATIONAL phrase added. IN cobolWord (was IDENTIFIER). SemanticBuilder updated for parallel name/ordinal array iteration. Integration tests: SymbolicCharacters_SingleMapping, SymbolicCharacters_NNMapping, SymbolicCharacters_WithInAlphabet, SymbolicCharacters_ForAlphanumeric.

new_items.title: SORT Format 2 runtime — table sort binder/lowerer/emitter
new_items.description: SORT Format 2 (table sort) grammar is accepted (M402 complete), but the binder resolves the sort target as a FileSymbol. When the target is a data item with OCCURS, the sort is silently skipped. Need: binder detects table sort target, lowerer generates in-memory sort IR, emitter produces Array.Sort or equivalent.
deliverables: Detect table sort target in BindSort (OCCURS clause on target)
Add BoundTableSortStatement or extend BoundSortStatement with IsTableSort flag
Lower table sort to IR (in-memory sort using key comparisons)
Emit CIL for in-memory table sort
Add integration tests verifying actual sort output
risks: Multi-key sort with mixed ascending/descending requires custom comparer
OCCURS DEPENDING ON tables have variable size
test_impact: GrammarBatch2Tests sort tests (upgrade from parser-only to output-verifying)
